tool.name: Cursor
tool.description: AI-first code editor with built-in chat, Composer agent mode, and multi-model support. The most popular AI IDE.

releases.name: Self-hosted Cloud Agents
releases.body: Cursor now supports self-hosted cloud agents that keep your code and tool execution entirely in your own network.

releases.name: Composer 2
releases.body: Composer 2 is now available in Cursor: frontier-level coding performance with strong results on challenging coding tasks.

releases.name: New Plugins on the Cursor Marketplace
releases.body: Added 30+ new plugins from Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, and PlanetScale.

releases.name: Automations
releases.body: Cursor now supports automations for building always-on agents that run based on triggers and instructions.

releases.name: Cursor in JetBrains IDEs
releases.body: Cursor is now available in IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, and other JetBrains IDEs through ACP.

releases.name: MCP Apps and Team Marketplaces for Plugins
releases.body: MCP Apps support interactive UIs like charts, diagrams, and whiteboards directly inside Cursor.

releases.name: Bugbot Autofix
releases.body: Autofix runs cloud agents to test changes and propose fixes directly on your PR. Over 35% of Autofix changes are merged.

releases.name: Cloud Agents with Computer Use
releases.body: Cloud agents can now use computer use capabilities.

releases.name: CLI Improvements and Mermaid ASCII Diagrams
releases.body: CLI improvements and Mermaid ASCII diagram rendering.

releases.name: Plugins, Sandbox Access Controls, and Async Subagents
releases.body: New plugins system, sandbox access controls, and async subagents.

releases.name: Long-running Agents in Research Preview
releases.body: Long-running agents are now in research preview.

releases.name: Subagents, Skills, and Image Generation
releases.body: Subagents, skills system, and image generation capabilities.

releases.name: CLI Agent Modes and Cloud Handoff
releases.body: New CLI agent modes and cloud handoff features.

releases.name: New CLI Features and Improved CLI Performance
releases.body: New CLI features and improved performance.

releases.name: Layout Customization and Stability Improvements
releases.body: Layout customization options and stability improvements.

releases.name: Enterprise Insights, Billing Groups, Service Accounts
releases.body: Enterprise insights, billing groups, service accounts, and improved security controls.

releases.name: Debug Mode, Plan Mode Improvements, Multi-Agent Judging
releases.body: Debug mode, plan mode improvements, multi-agent judging, and pinned chats.

releases.name: Improved Plan Mode, AI Code Review in Editor
releases.body: Improved plan mode, AI code review in editor, and instant grep.

releases.name: New Coding Model and Agent Interface
releases.body: New coding model and redesigned agent interface.

releases.name: Browser Controls, Plan Mode, and Hooks
releases.body: Browser controls, plan mode, and hooks.
